message:
Command `
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=1101105

# Quick check
SC=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 5)
T1=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "Syscall: $SC CPU: $T1"

# Drain pipe
dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=65536 count=16 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -5 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

sleep 3
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "After drain: $T1 → $T2"
` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "

ORPID=1101105

# Quick check
SC=$(cat /proc/$ORPID/syscall 2>/dev/null | head -c 5)
T1=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "Syscall: $SC CPU: $T1"

# Drain pipe
dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=65536 count=16 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null
wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -5 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

sleep 3
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "After drain: $T1 → $T2"
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

# Quick check

tail -5 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log

sleep 3
T2=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
echo "After drain: $T1 → $T2"
" timed out
